title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Okan Homepage

Announcements

The OPAE (Okan Proficiency Academic Exam in English) Proficiency Exam

17
						February

2026

Dear Students,

The OPAE (Okan Proficiency Academic Exam in English), Proficiency Exam will be held

face to face on Tuesday, February 24, at our Tuzla Campus.

Students who are registered for the

Spring Semester

and who have been placed through

YÖS

, as well as students admitted through

horizontal transfer

, will be eligible to apply for this exam. Applications will be accepted via

aleynа.acikalin@okan.edu.tr

Following the completion of the application process, students will be added to the relevant folders on the

O’Learn system

, and information regarding the

exam room and time

will be announced through the O’Learn platform. Students are kindly requested to follow all announcements related to the exam process via O’Learn.

You can log in to O’Learn using the username and password provided to you by our University.

en

tr
